title: ChatGPT

description: Anthropic's AI assistant, known for excellent coding abilities and large context windows.

title: Google Gemini
description: Google's multimodal AI model for reasoning, math, and code generation.

title: Perplexity
description: An AI-powered search engine that provides cited answers and up-to-date information.

title: GitHub Copilot
description: Your AI pair programmer that suggests code and entire functions in real-time.

description: An AI-first code editor built to make you extraordinarily productive.

title: V0 by Vercel
description: Generative UI system that produces React code based on text prompts and images.

title: Regex101
description: An interactive tool for testing and debugging regular expressions with live explanations.

description: Seamlessly visualize your JSON data instantly into interactive graphs.

title: Excalidraw
description: Virtual whiteboard for sketching hand-drawn like diagrams and software architecture.

title: Figma
description: The collaborative interface design tool. A must-have for modern UI/UX workflows.

title: Bundlephobia

title: DevDocs
description: Combines multiple API documentations in a fast, organized, and searchable interface (works offline).

description: Another popular tool for creating and sharing beautiful images of your source code.

title: Roadmap.sh
description: Step by step guides and paths to learn different tools or technologies in software development.

title: Ngrok

title: Postman

title: Coolors
